title: Update vendor of boltdb and containers/image

comments.body: Yeah, that’s almost certainly a bug in https://github.com/containers/image/pull/836 . I’ll take a look later today.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #5534) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #5644) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.

Needs a rebase
I don't see the auth changes happening due to the vendor update.  I'd much prefer that in a separate PR, or at least noted in the title/description of this PR.
